events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce raw JSON answer. Need evaluate described field condition. Scenario: measurement record for transformers dry-type & pad-mount shows as-left reading inside posted limit. Gauge readable, setup stable, same value entered on inspection form. Reference NEC Art. 450, 250.30. Work stage rough-complete. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info, risk, component_conditions, percent_complete, value? No numeric value provided. We can set value null? Schema says value 0 default? It says value numeric reading or computed quantity when task asks for one. No specific numeric reading provided; can leave 0 or maybe null. But JSON schema says number. They used 0 in example. We'll use 0 with maybe rationale no numeric value recorded. Confidence high. component_conditions: none flagged - judge from evidence: likely empty. Decision pass because reading inside tolerance, proper documentation. Risk low. Work_stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 75. Findings empty. Actions empty. Rationale: measurement within tolerance, instrument readable/stable, inspection form matches, no defects or non-compliance identified at rough-complete; NEC 450 and 250.30 support transformer installation and grounding. References: NEC Art. 450, 250.30. Need raw JSON only. Ensure fields all present.
